Am I a good fit for this job? Tailor my resume Selected Intern's Day-to-day Responsibilities Include Work on various challenging and rewarding projects across different software development domains. Get hands-on experience with the latest programming languages, frameworks, and technologies. Collaborate with experienced developers and learn from their expertise. Contribute to code reviews and participate in discussions about design and implementation. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code. Test and debug existing code to ensure quality and functionality. Learn about the software development lifecycle and agile methodologies. About Company: Talview is at the forefront of AI-driven proctoring solutions, offering state-of-the-art technology designed to revolutionize the way educational institutions, certification bodies, and IT companies conduct assessments and certifications. Our commitment to integrity, reliability, and innovation has made us a trusted partner for organizations looking to enhance the credibility and security of their online examination processes.
